name: Muffaletta Rellenos Bake
recipeIngredient: Ca. Hormel Chili No Beans (15 ounces)
Chopped green chiles from a can (4 ounces), drained
Sargento Fancy Supreme Shredded Cheese (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chili and the next four ingredients; stir well.
2. Spread the mixture into a greased 11-inch by 7-inch by 2-inch baking dish.
3. Sprinkle with cheese.
4. Prepare the egg mixture: whisk eggs, mayonnaise, milk, flour, and baking powder until smooth.
5. Spoon the egg mixture over the cheese, spreading evenly.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes or until set.
7. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
